import React,{useEffect,useState,useCallback,useRef}from'react';import api from'../utils/api';import Box from'@mui/material/Box';import Grid from'@mui/material/Grid';import Typography from'@mui/material/Typography';import Chip from'@mui/material/Chip';import Skeleton from'@mui/material/Skeleton';import MediaCard from'../components/MediaCard';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const FILTERS=['All','Videos','Music','Movies','Images'];const typeMap={Videos:'video',Music:'music',Movies:'movie',Images:'image'};const Home=()=>{const[media,setMedia]=useState([]);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);const[filter,setFilter]=useState('All');const pageRef=useRef(1);const[hasMore,setHasMore]=useState(true);const fetchMedia=useCallback(async(pageNum,type)=>{try{setLoading(true);const params={page:pageNum,limit:20};if(type&&type!=='All')params.type=typeMap[type];const res=await api.get('/media/feed',{params});if(pageNum===1){setMedia(res.data.items||[]);}else{setMedia(prev=>[...prev,...(res.data.items||[])]);}setHasMore(res.data.page<res.data.pages);}catch(err){console.error('Failed to load media:',err);setMedia([]);}finally{setLoading(false);}},[]);useEffect(()=>{pageRef.current=1;fetchMedia(1,filter);},[filter,fetchMedia]);// Infinite scroll
useEffect(()=>{const handleScroll=()=>{if(window.innerHeight+document.documentElement.scrollTop>=document.documentElement.offsetHeight-500){if(!loading&&hasMore){pageRef.current+=1;fetchMedia(pageRef.current,filter);}}};window.addEventListener('scroll',handleScroll);return()=>window.removeEventListener('scroll',handleScroll);},[loading,hasMore,filter,fetchMedia]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Box,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Box,{sx:{display:'flex',gap:1,mb:3,overflowX:'auto',pb:1,'&::-webkit-scrollbar':{height:0}},children:FILTERS.map(f=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Chip,{label:f,onClick:()=>setFilter(f),sx:{bgcolor:filter===f?'#fff':'#272727',color:filter===f?'#000':'#fff',fontWeight:500,'&:hover':{bgcolor:filter===f?'#e0e0e0':'#3a3a3a'},borderRadius:'8px',px:1}},f))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Grid,{container:true,spacing:2,children:loading&&media.length===0?Array.from({length:12}).map((_,i)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Grid,{item:true,xs:12,sm:6,md:4,lg:3,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Skeleton,{variant:"rounded",sx:{aspectRatio:'16/9',borderRadius:'12px'}}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Box,{sx:{display:'flex',gap:1.5,mt:1},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Skeleton,{variant:"circular",width:36,height:36}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Box,{sx:{flex:1},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Skeleton,{width:"90%"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Skeleton,{width:"60%"})]})]})]},i)):media.map(m=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Grid,{item:true,xs:12,sm:6,md:4,lg:3,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(MediaCard,{media:m})},m._id))}),!loading&&media.length===0&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Box,{sx:{textAlign:'center',mt:8},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Typography,{variant:"h6",color:"text.secondary",children:"No content yet"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Typography,{variant:"body2",color:"text.secondary",children:"Be the first to upload!"})]})]});};export default Home;
